DefaultDescriptionFormat.SourceString:
A seer once dreamed about brave warriors who walked across Ashenfall in another time. An age both past and present, where the rules of the world were different. These great heroes challenged and slew an echo of Velgar, saving a land that never was. 
While the seer’s memory of that dream fades with each passing moment, she was able to embroider the event into a cape, so that all might know of these legends from another time.
